title: Militants
description: Suitable for people who like military uniforms.
body:
Armor and zombies are designed to wear military uniforms.

Many mods do not provide military uniforms.

Although it doesn’t make much sense in personal saves, on multiplayer servers, playing with friends in the bushes while holding guns is quite fun.

**More versions will be provided in the future.**
##

把盔甲與殭屍設計成穿軍服的樣式。

因為許多模組並無提供軍服。

雖然在個人存檔中並沒有甚麼意義，但在多人伺服器中，拿著槍枝與朋友在草叢中玩，相當有趣。

**未來將提供更多版本。**
